title: Dataset of plasma non-esterified fatty acid concentrations response of a suckling cow exposed to a feed restriction
author: Luciano Barreto Mendes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The detaset describes the response of a suckler cow in terms of plasma non-esterified fatty-acids (NEFA) concentrations, that was exposed to a feed restriction that consisted in the reduction of net energy requirements by 50%. The dataset has two columns, one for time (t) in days (d) and another column for plasma NEFA concentrations (g·L -1 ). The feed restriction started at t = 1 d and lasted untill t = 4 d. Negative values for t represent the pre-challenge period.
steps_raw: The detaset describes the response of a suckler cow in terms of plasma non-esterified fatty-acids (NEFA) concentrations, that was exposed to a feed restriction that consisted in the reduction of net energy requirements by 50%. Negative values for t represent the pre-challenge period.
